item.title: K1 bonus and agent support pages refreshed - 2026-07-04
item.description: Bonus, referral, FAQ, support, privacy and account access pages were refreshed with consistent HTML and sitemap freshness signals. This is a technical freshness signal, not a ranking, indexing, traffic or GSC metric claim.
